name: Crepes Lucifer
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and salt.
2. Make a well in the center and add the eggs, egg yolk, milk, water, and melted butter. Mix until smooth.
3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter into the center to form a thin circle.
4. Cook for about 2 minutes or until the edges start to lift from the pan.
5. Using a spatula, gently slide the crepe out of the pan and onto a plate.
6. In another bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, melted chocolate, milk, and sugar. Mix until smooth.
7. Spread the filling evenly over one side of each crepe.
8. Fold the crepes into thirds or fourths to create a tight package.
9. Serve immediately and enjoy your Crepes Lucifer!
